title: Cheesy Sausage & Pepper Traybake
summary: This is the kind of traybake you put in the oven and forget about. Golden sausages, crisp-edged gnocchi, sweet peppers and melted cheese come together in one pan for a low-effort, high-reward dinner.

method.description: Heat the oven to 210°C. Core, deseed and chop the peppers into chunks. Tip them into a large roasting tray along with the gnocchi.

Sprinkle over the herbes de provence, a generous pinch of salt and black pepper, then drizzle with the olive oil. Give everything a good mix. Halve the chipolatas and scatter them over the tray. Roast in the oven for 20 mins, or until the sausages are starting to colour and the gnocchi are crispy on the edges.
Meanwhile, finely grate the parmesan and set aside.

Once the tray’s been in for 20 mins, remove it from the oven and nestle in the mozzarella balls and sprinkle over two-thirds of the parmesan. Return to the oven for another 5 mins, or until the sausages are golden and cooked through.
Spoon onto plates and top with the remaining parmesan.

chefs.name: Anna Helm Baxter
chefs.summary: Anna Helm Baxter is a cookbook author, food stylist, and food producer at Mob. Having spent most of her life in the US, she loves potlucks, tailgates, and a good Thanksgiving spread. As a working mum of three, she gets the dinner struggle, which is why she’s all about recipes that are joyful, healthy, and totally doable. And if all else fails she always has cookies stashed in the freezer.
